mapper.select:
SELECT s.AR_SHIFTGROUP_MANAGE_NO, s.PERSON_ID, e.EMPID, e.LOCAL_NAME, s.BEFOR_SHIFT_NO, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(s.BEFOR_SHIFT_NO, #{lang}) AS BEFOR_SHIFT_NAME, s.SHIFT_NO, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(s.SHIFT_NO, #{lang}) AS SHIFT_NAME, TO_CHAR(s.START_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS START_DATE, s.REMARK, TO_CHAR(s.CREATE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS CREATE_DATE, s.CREATED_BY, TO_CHAR(s.UPDATE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS UPDATE_DATE, s.UPDATED_BY, s.ACTIVITY FROM AR_SHIFTGROUP_MANAGEMENT s LEFT JOIN HR_EMPLOYEE e ON e.PERSON_ID = s.PERSON_ID WHERE e.CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId}
AND UPPER(e.EMPID) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{empId}) || '%'
AND UPPER(e.LOCAL_NAME) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{empName}) || '%'
ORDER BY s.START_DATE DESC, e.EMPID
